blocks.text: Press the inside of the mirror holder (A). Reach into the gap on the outside and remove the mirror holder.

items: Note that forcible removal of the mirror housing while it is fixed to the clip will damage the mirror housing or actuator.

blocks.text: Remove the mirror holder (A). For vehicles equipped with mirror heater: Disconnect the mirror heater terminal (B).
Before installing the mirror holder, inspect the installation condition of the actuator rod (A) and actuator boot (B) and lubricate the sliding parts.

items: Check that the actuator rod is inserted into the actuator, and if it is not, insert it securely.
Ensure that the actuator boot covers the entire actuator rod. If the actuator boot tip is misaligned or out of root, return it to the correct position.

blocks.text: For vehicles equipped with mirror heater: Connect the mirror heater terminal (A). Install the mirror holder (B). Check the operation of the power mirrors.
